calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-06-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: Mars Goodman and Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Robert Cohen, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff, Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc. A California Corporation.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Charles Medlin aka Charles T. Medlin, aka Chuck Medlin; White Enterprises, LLC.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- 10 dismissed without prejudice.
Declaration of Martin Romero on file.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $44,639.74
Pre-Judgment Interest: $3,632.33
Attorney's Fees: $2,948.00
Costs: $480.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $51,700.07
Judgment signed in open court.
